name: PostgreSQL
short_description: Open-source relational database with JSON support, full-text search, and extensions.
description: PostgreSQL is a powerful, open-source object-relational database system known for reliability, feature robustness, and performance. It supports both SQL (relational) and JSON (non-relational) querying, making it perfect for modern applications. Features include ACID compliance, MVCC for co...
usecases: Use as the database backend for complex applications like Wiki.js, Ghostfolio, or Home Assistant.
Store JSON data alongside relational data in the same database.
Enable full-text search for building search features in your applications.
Use pgvector extension for storing and querying AI embeddings.
notes: Can use volumes for data persistence
Supports numerous extensions for specialized use cases
